# Frontier Manifesto

> A framework for human and agentic co-work in the workplace.

## Pages

- [The Frontier Manifesto](https://frontiermanifesto.ai/manifesto): The core framework. Ten principles for organisations that own their technology outcomes.
- [Agile wasn't designed for a world where AI agents are part of the team](https://frontiermanifesto.ai/posts/the-frontier-manifesto): The framing article. Why Agile needs a second stream for agentic delivery.
- [About](https://frontiermanifesto.ai/about/): About the author, Gareth Manuel — software engineer and engineering leader with over twenty years of experience.
